'''√s-zh-r''' ('''kasazhar''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:maddle|maddle]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-zh-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:maddle|maddle]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √s-zh-r
|-
! Lemma
| kasazhar
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thisazhar || jisazhar || shisazhar || kisazhar
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthusazhar || jujusazhar || shushusazhar || kukusazhar
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thusazhar || jusazhar || shusazhar || kusazhar
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thusazhar || jusazhar || shusazhar || kusazhar
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || thesazhar || jesazhar || shesazhar || kesazhar
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thothosazhar || jojosazhar || shoshosazhar || kokosazhar
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || thosazhar || josazhar || shosazhar || kosazhar
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || thosazhar || josazhar || shosazhar || kosazhar
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || sazhar || sazhar || sazhar || sazhar
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || sazhar || sazhar || sazhar || sazhar
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || sazhar || sazhar || sazhar || sazhar
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || sazhar || sazhar || sazhar || sazhar
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thæsazhar || jæsazhar || shæsazhar || kæsazhar
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thathasazhar || jajasazhar || shashasazhar || kakasazhar
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || thasazhar || jasazhar || shasazhar || kasazhar
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || thasazhar || jasazhar || shasazhar || kasazhar
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || shasazhar
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || goshasazhar
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || gokishasazhar
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || shasazharnü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || goshasazharnknü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokishasazharnü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || shasazharshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || goshasazharnkshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokishasazharshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || shasazharro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || goshasazharnkro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokishasazharro
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || shasazharmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || goshasazharnkmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokishasazharmu
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || shasazharsher
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || goshasazharnksher
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokishasazharsher
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || shasazharng
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || goshasazharnkng
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokishasazharng
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || shasazharya
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || goshasazharnkya
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokishasazharya
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || shasazharyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || goshasazharnkyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokishasazharyam
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || shasazharnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || goshasazharnknüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokishasazharnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || shasazharnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || goshasazharnknüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishasazharnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || shasazharnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || goshasazharnknümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokishasazharnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || shasazharshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || goshasazharnkshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokishasazharshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || shasazharshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || goshasazharnkshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishasazharshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || shasazharshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || goshasazharnkshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokishasazharshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || shasazharronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || goshasazharnkronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokishasazharronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || shasazharroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || goshasazharnkroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokishasazharroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || shasazharromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || goshasazharnkromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokishasazharromu
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || shasazharmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || goshasazharnkmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokishasazharmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || shasazharmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || goshasazharnkmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokishasazharmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || shasazharmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || goshasazharnkmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishasazharmuro
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|d176386}}
